_tiers: fastest=cheap high-volume work | balanced=code gen, research | capable=hard reasoning, judgment
_values: any model ID your Codex runtime accepts, e.g. 'gpt-5.6', 'gpt-5.6-terra', 'gpt-5.6-mini', or 'inherit' to use the session's active model
_inherit_note: When resolving 'inherit' into an agent's .toml file, OMIT the model key entirely rather than writing the literal string 'inherit' — Codex custom agents expect either a real model slug or no key at all.

_examples.codex+terra-review: { orchestrator: gpt-5.6, reviewer-verifier: gpt-5.6-terra, explorer: gpt-5.6-mini }
